summary: Tested NEW feature: Fiches Techniques / Recettes. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Recipe section accessible via sidebar, recipe cards display prix vente/cout revient/marge, modal for creating new recipes works. Recipe deduction on invoice validation working correctly (8 ingredients deducted for Poulet braise).
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/recipes - List recipes with cost_price, margin, margin_percent calculated
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/recipes - Create new recipe with ingredients
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/recipes/seed-demo - Seed 'Poulet braise' demo recipe
✅ Backend: Poulet braise recipe exists with caisse_product_name='Poulet braise', selling_price=3500, 8 ingredients
✅ Backend: Cost calculation correct (cost_price=1953, margin=1547, margin_percent=44.2%)
✅ Backend: Recipe deduction on invoice validation - 2x Poulet braise → 8 stock movements created
✅ Backend: Stock movements contain 'Recette: Poulet braise' in reason field
✅ Backend: Fallback behavior - products without recipe use direct name match
✅ Frontend: 'Fiches Techniques' nav item visible in sidebar
✅ Frontend: Recipe cards show Prix de vente, Cout de revient, Marge with correct values
✅ Frontend: Ingredients table shows all 8 ingredients with quantities and current stock
✅ Frontend: 'Nouvelle Fiche' button opens creation modal
✅ Frontend: Modal has ingredient selector dropdown and quantity field
critical_code_review_comments: Recipe CRUD endpoints in /app/backend/routers/stock.py (lines 558-694) correctly implemented
Invoice validation with recipe deduction in /app/backend/server.py (lines 3389-3435) uses regex exact match on caisse_product_name
Cost calculation enriches recipes with current product prices on GET /recipes
Frontend StockPage.jsx has complete recipe section with cards, modal, and CRUD operations
seed_data_creation: Test recipes created with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiches Techniques feature fully working. Recipe CRUD at /api/stock/recipes. Demo recipe 'Poulet braise' seeded with 8 ingredients. Invoice validation checks for recipe by caisse_product_name (regex exact match, case-insensitive). If recipe found, deducts all ingredients from stock with reason 'Vente (Recette: {name}) - Facture {number}'. If no recipe, falls back to direct product name match. Frontend has dedicated 'Fiches Techniques' section in Stock module sidebar.

recipe_cost_calculation.notes: cost_price, margin, margin_percent calculated from current product prices

recipe_deduction_on_invoice.notes: Validating invoice with 'Poulet braise' deducts all 8 ingredients from stock

recipe_movement_tracking.notes: Stock movements include recipe_id and 'Recette: {name}' in reason

fallback_without_recipe.notes: Products without recipe use direct name match (existing behavior)

frontend_recipe_section.notes: Sidebar nav, recipe cards, creation modal all functional
